name: C5-781/Anatolia’s Mercenary
description: Anatolia's Mercenary is a mech pilot from the independent colony Anatolia. He became Anatolia's guardian following the advent of Pax Economica, where she partnered with Emil Gustav and Fiona Jarnefeldt to support the colony by performing missions for corporations. Long story short, his friend Joshua O'Brien betrayed him and destroyed his colony due to blackmail, and now she uses the name White Glint in honor of the man. His mech, White Glint, is white and black, with two rifles and missiles.
creator: AQ-449
